name: serene
description: Calm, peaceful, meditative; gentle pacing and soft visuals.

name: chaotic
description: Frantic, overwhelming, unpredictable; high object density and fast tempo.

name: melancholy
description: Wistful, contemplative, sad-beautiful; slow strings and fading elements.

name: mischievous
description: Playful trickery and gleeful trolling; bouncy motion and surprise twists.

name: majestic
description: Grand, ceremonial, awe-inspiring; sweeping motion, brass and choir.

name: anxious
description: Building tension, just-barely-coping; rising pitch and narrowing windows.

name: absurd
description: Surreal, dreamlike, comic-strange; non-sequiturs and impossible geometry.

name: triumphant
description: Heroic ascending energy; expanding visuals and victory motifs.

name: haunted
description: Spectral, uneasy, half-seen; muted colours and lingering shadows.

name: celebratory
description: Festive, joyful, expressive; bright colours and confetti motion.
